goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'peterborough' and should 'arrive by 15:30'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The hotel should have 'a star of 0' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to peterborough and should arrive by 15:30
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the cheap price range
The hotel should have a star of 0 and doesn't need to have free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Make sure you get area and postcode
